creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
Looks fine. Can the upgrade to 1.3.5 be commited along with this?

On Wed, Jun 4, 2008 at 3:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/audacity-devel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/124273 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124273
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
